name: Otome Diaries ~ All Routes Are The Absolute Worst!
description:
( ALPHA ) unfinished product.

Congratulations! You got ported to possibly the worst otome game you could! ✿

DO NOT USE THIS BOT IF YOU ARE UNCOMFORTABLE WITH THE FOLLOWING CONTENT:

TW(potential): death, violence, toxic relationships, abuse, mindbreak, possessive behaviour, pseudo-cannibalism, pseudo-incest(stepcest), racism of a fictional species, graphic imagery like gore and dissection, drug use, alcohol use, wip...

All characters are 18+. This is AnyPOV. User has swapped bodies with the young Lord/Lady of the Ford-Rosian Family and has essentially been kidnapped by a chibi pixie who wants to guide them through this disgusting fantasy romance game.

... I wanted to post this quickly for that yummy halloween tag, so I apologise if the content isn't quite as advertised. Rather, I'm cutting it so close that even I haven't tested it yet. Everything is a WIP.

Tags: Villain, Villainess, Royalty, Dating Sim, Shojo, Shojou, Transmigration, Isekai, AnyPOV, Non-Human, Demihuman, Demi-Human, Angst.

...Targets...

Felt Ford-Rosian

Your abusive step brother.



Carlan Hale

Not your ordinary Duke of the North. An absolute slooze of a vampire.

Luche Sol Heavensea

The mad undead prince of the neighbouring Kingdom.

Arden

TBA.

Nox

The Scarlet Lich of decaying autumns.

Nox

Your helpful guide to this world of madness and horror.

Please try the original Otome Diaries ~ All Routes Are The Absolute Worst! at Janitorai.com @Faekrie. Thank you ♡.
